description_long: This object consists of two modern tactical shotguns, each featuring a compact design with polymer and metal components. The shotguns have distinct color schemes: one is primarily olive green with black accents, while the other is tan with black elements. Both weapons are equipped with tactical rails along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and have short barrels with muzzle attachments. The stocks are minimalist, with one featuring a folding wire stock and the other a pistol grip without a full stock. The magazines are detachable and extend below the receiver, indicating a box-fed mechanism. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws, textured grips, and ergonomic features suitable for urban tactical use.
description: A pair of compact, tactical shotguns with polymer and metal construction, featuring detachable magazines, tactical rails, and minimalist stocks in olive green and tan color schemes.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the two shotguns' parallel arrangement, highlighting the rails, magazines, and the contrasting colors of the stocks and receivers.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profiles, including the folding wire stock on one shotgun and the pistol grip on the other, as well as the tactical rails and muzzle attachments.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back ends of the stocks and grips, with the magazines and barrel ends less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the length of the barrels, the folding stock, and the ergonomic pistol grip, with clear visibility of the magazine wells.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short tactical barrels with visible muzzle attachments and no ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: one folding stock, one pistol grip with no full stock
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guards with smooth contours and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
